puzzle.hint: This verb describes the divine act of showing the right way.
puzzle.arabicVerse: يَهْدِىٓ إِلَى ٱلرُّشْدِ فَـَٔامَنَّا بِهِۦ ۖ وَلَن نُّشْرِكَ بِرَبِّنَآ أَحَدًۭا
puzzle.verse: 72:2 — It guides to the right course, and we have believed in it. And we will never associate with our Lord anyone.
